creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
On Fri, 22 Jan 1999, Tom Hukins wrote:

>Indeed, we already have 9 Netscape ports in the tree. If there's a
>good reason why this port should be separate, that's fine. If you do
>upgrade linux-netscape4, feel free to change the maintainer (it's me
>at present).

Well, I was going to submit a followup but what do you know? Communicator
core dumps when I click the Follow Up link.

This is my first port ever and it is highly plagiarized. I was thrilled
when it ran. I do not know how the ports folks want to proceed on this
one. I can't really say whether this should be an upgrade or a seperate
port.

Perhaps we can add it as a seperate port for now. Maybe someone can figure
out why it core dumps. Maybe someone would like to use this port as a
model for a "just navigator" port.

After (if ever) it washes out OK we can drop the linux-netscape4 port.

If someone with knowledge and authority wants to make a decision with it
as they please it is fine with me.

Catchya Later,		|	Give me UNIX or give me a typewriter.
Jason Wells		|	http://www.freebsd.org/
